query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_partenariat FROM leads WHERE leadType = 'PARTENARIAT'; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_candidates FROM partner_candidates WHERE source = 'meta_lead'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as leads_sans_candidat FROM leads l LEFT JOIN partner_candidates pc ON pc.metaLeadId = l.id WHERE l.leadType = 'PARTENARIAT' AND pc.id IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_partenariat FROM leads WHERE leadType = 'PARTENARIAT'; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_candidates FROM partner_candidates WHERE source = 'meta_lead'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as leads_sans_candidat FROM leads l LEFT JOIN partner_candidates pc ON pc.metaLeadId = l.id WHERE l.leadType = 'PARTENARIAT' AND pc.id IS NULL;
